business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

positives: Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 (below 1.00, indicating better than average loss experience)
concerns: Construction-related classifications including carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, and painting which are higher-hazard exposures

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Classification schedule includes: Carpentry NOC (Code 5403, $5,915,000 remuneration), Electrical Wiring (Code 5190, $4,544,000), Plumbing NOC (Code 5183, $3,075,000), Masonry NOC (Code 5022, $6,635,850), Painting Interior (Code 5474, $1,639,000), Contractors Project Manager/Superintendent (Code 5606, $4,776,000), and Clerical Office Employees NOC (Code 8810, $5,010,000).
